name: Adient plc
business: Adient is a global leader in the automotive seating supply industry with leading market positions in the Americas, Europe and Asia and maintains longstanding relationships with the largest global automotive original equipment manufacturers (OEMs). Adient designs, manufactures and markets a full range of seating systems and components for passenger cars, commercial vehicles and light trucks, including vans, pick-up trucks and sport/crossover utility vehicles.
sellsTo: Passenger cars, commercial vehicles, light trucks
namedCustomers: Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd.

exposures.sentence: Adient continues to invest in technology and innovation by utilizing automation in metals, foam, trim and complete seat operations as well as expanding the use of artificial intelligence (AI).
Adient continues to invest in technology and innovation by utilizing automation in metals, foam, trim and complete seat operations as well as expanding the use of artificial intelligence (AI).
Electric vehicles (EVs) continue to be a focus in the global automotive industry driven by a variety of product offerings from legacy manufacturers and from new entrants.

As the global automotive industry continues to incorporate ADAS/ADS into its vehicles and as alternative usage models evolve, such as car sharing and urban mobility, Adient is poised to capitalize on greater seating content that may accompany these new innovations.
Adient has developed an interiors concept for autonomous driving which addresses major seating and other interior trends that are expected to drive the automotive industry of the future.
Adient has set a goal to attribute 100% of the electricity consumed at its manufacturing sites worldwide to renewable sources by 2035.
The global adoption of electric vehicles by consumers has also slowed, creating disruptions in production scheduling.

The automotive industry remains focused on the development of advanced driver assistance technologies, with the goal of developing and introducing a commercially-viable, fully automated driving experience.

catalysts.event: Reduce scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions 75% by 2030
catalysts.sentence: Adient set a goal of reducing its scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions 75% by 2030 (with 2019 as the base year) and continues to make progress toward that goal.

catalysts.event: Achieve carbon neutrality at manufacturing sites for scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2040
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, by 2040, Adient aspires to achieve carbon neutrality at its manufacturing sites for scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions.

catalysts.event: Attribute 100% of electricity consumed at manufacturing sites to renewable sources by 2035
catalysts.sentence: In addition, Adient has set a goal to attribute 100% of the electricity consumed at its manufacturing sites worldwide to renewable sources by 2035.
